'''Salt mynocks''' were a subspecies of the parasitic [[Mynock/Legends|Mynock]] that lived on the barren [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] planet [[Lok/Legends|Lok]].

A variant of the salt mynock was the Lowland salt mynock.

==Appearances==
